name: Ecovacs Deebot
short_description: A line of autonomous robot vacuum-and-mop appliances that map a home and clean it without supervision.
long_description: Deebot is Ecovacs Robotics' family of floor-cleaning robots, first launched in 2007 and grown into the flagship X series with LiDAR and dToF mapping, AIVI 3D structured-light obstacle recognition, and the YIKO voice assistant. The robots build a persistent map of a home, plan cleaning routes, avoid cables and pets, and return to a dock to self-empty and re-water. As one of the most widely sold physical AI products, Deebot shows how autonomous navigation and perception became an unremarkable household appliance, normalizing a self-directed mobile robot that shares domestic space with people every day.

images.caption: An Ecovacs robot vacuum cleaner on display at the Building Fairs Brno 2011 exhibition.
images.alt_text: A round disc-shaped Ecovacs robot vacuum cleaner sitting on a display stand at a trade fair.
